name: swiss-clinical-placement-index
description: Open-source TypeScript platform for Swiss clinical placement source indexing.

scripts.check:local: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm crawl -- --sources packages/sources/sources.local.example.yaml --out data/local/dry-run --dry-run --limit 3
scripts.pipeline:local: pnpm crawl:local && pnpm build:data:local && pnpm lead-time:build -- --data data/local/current && pnpm review:report -- --data data/local/current --out data/local/current/review-needed.md && pnpm coverage:report -- --sources packages/sources/sources.local.example.yaml --data data/local/current --out data/local/current && pnpm reliability:audit -- --data data/local/current --sources packages/sources/sources.local.example.yaml --out data/local/current && pnpm validate:data:local && pnpm --filter @scpi/web build -- --data data/local/current --exports data/local/exports --out data/local/site
